channel.title: Me on Liam Inwards
channel.description: Recent content in Me on Liam Inwards

item.title: A Introduction [ 📌 PINNED ]
item.description: A Introduction about me and the purpose of this website
item.content:encoded:
Greetings! My name is Liam Inwards. I am 20 years old and live my life in the Netherlands, Over the past three years I have been embarking on a life changing journey of personal development and growth. During this journey I have been building the foundations of my spiritual beliefs that have just now recently led me to the christian faith. If I could show my former self where I would stand this current day I would have never thought it possible. Now that being said I can already hear you thinking, “why would I be interested in what this young fellow has to say? What does he have to bring to the table?”. And fair enough, I am currently thinking the exact same thing. However one reason that has motivated me to start writing this introduction is the thought of it being a sort of counter reaction to the quick fix overloaded information and entertainment age we live in. I’m mainly thinking of the now all-to-common TikTok/YouTube feeds. These forms of entertainment steal so much of our time and dopamine without giving us much in return. As a former drug addict I cannot let myself get too engaged by these forms of entertainment because addicts are connoisseurs of all things dopamine, and thus we will get lost in the act. My past as a depressed drug addict has taught me a few things about human behavior and about how one can change his behavior. These are also the kinds of topics I am interested in writing about. Another reason I got inspired to launch a personal writing site happened after the corona crisis when we had just witnessed some of the effects of a secular western society projecting its natural human inclination towards religious believes on to “The Sciences”. Those three years totally changed and shaped the way I looked at human beings and society overall. It left me with a enormous amount of questions about our human nature and what is needed to foster the best human behavior out of ourselves and others. These questions led me to search for answers in books and caused a lot of introspection about myself. I do not proclaim in any way to be knowledgeable in any field and I don’t have any degree in any specific subject, however the point of these musings will not be to impose my thought’s on others but to continue the exploration I was already doing but now sharing it with the world for anybody who has any interest! Maybe by writing about topics related to the above I can bring back some food for thought and meet like minded people with whom we can build a vision for the future that would be worth our effort.

I hope to see you in the future!
